top_signals.title: UBS sees copper market deficit supporting long positions
top_signals.summary: UBS maintains a favorable outlook on copper despite recent price volatility, with LME copper prices holding above $13,000 per metric ton after surrendering some earlier gains. alerts.title: Argentina formally ratifies the Nairobi Wreck Removal Convention
alerts.summary: The Argentine Republic has officially ratified the Nairobi International Convention on the Removal of Wrecks (2007).
